Japanese-inspired modern mechanical watch brand. Known for designs inspired by Japanese culture, nature, and cyberpunk aesthetics. Current collections include SHIRAHAMA 2 and OKAMI models with multiple colorway variants.

Japanese-inspired microbrand creating modern mechanical watches with cyberpunk and nature-influenced aesthetics. Current collection includes SHIRAHAMA 2 and OKAMI series. Offers 24-month warranty with global shipping and DDP options for U.S. customers.

Nektom Watches displays a 'Coming Soon' page with no accessible product information, pricing, or location details. The site is powered by Shopify but appears to be in pre-launch phase with no confirmed activity history available.
Neonos is listed in the Microbrand Watches Database as an active microbrand. Country of origin and additional brand details are not provided in the available source material.

Nethuns is a watch brand founded by watch enthusiasts with a mission to create robust professional diver watches. The brand uses unique metals and materials with quality movements, designing durable timepieces intended to last a lifetime. The website contains multiple PHP errors and appears to have technical issues, with no clear pricing or product information accessible.

German watch brand specializing in one-hand watches with the proprietary DoubleSpeed mechanism for enhanced legibility. Features the JANUS Principle design and offers hand-wound mechanical movements. Limited production runs, including strictly limited editions like JANUS minimal with only 99 pieces worldwide.

NFW is an active watch brand with a military/first responder focus, offering men's and women's collections. The brand emphasizes quality construction and donates to causes including Honor Flight, Chris Kyle Foundation, and Green Beret Foundation. Watches range from $199 to $655 USD with models including Valor, AutoPilot, Regulator, Vector, and Munich collections.

Nibosi is a watch brand specializing in men's and women's quartz and mechanical watches with stainless steel cases. The brand offers diverse collections including sport, luxury, chronograph, and car-themed watches. Currently operating with 124 products in inventory and active e-commerce operations across multiple currencies.

Nine Four Watches is a watch brand selling modern automatic and chronograph timepieces. Current collections include Successor 2 automatic watches and Culture Chronograph 2 models in various color variants. Prices are listed in GBP.

Nintai Watches is a microbrand focused on everyday endurance watches with in-house regulation, testing, and inspection. All watches include inspection cards and feature modern design with functionality. Brand operates on scheduled production windows and offers 14-day returns with 1-year warranty.

Nobel Timepieces offers stainless steel and two-tone watches with Swiss movements and sapphire crystals. Product range includes men's, women's, and sports collections with prices from $110-$375 USD. Features Bluetooth chronographs and leather bracelet variants.

Nordic-inspired watch brand offering sports watches with moon phase complications. Current collections include LUNØR, SØVÆRN, and ØSTERSØEN models. Offers 30-day returns, DHL express shipping, and 24-month warranty on manufacturing defects.

Brand rebranded from NUUN OFFICIAL to NUNCIER. Known for lightweight carbon composite watches with anti-shock design and collaborations (Peanuts, Al Ittihad). Offers multiple collections including Origen, Origen Carbon, Origen Steel, and Origen Pro models.

O&HoraPictor is the result of a merger between Orodol and HoraPictor brands. The brand specializes in luxury enamel artistry watches, with collections including sport-inspired models like Cyclist's Blaze and Grand Slam watches.

American watch brand established in New York in 2017. Specializes in dive watches with names inspired by marine life (Searaven, Manta Ray, Barracuda, Thresher, Mako). Offers models with Miyota movements and water resistance up to 200M, currently running sales with multiple models sold out.

Soviet Navy chronograph watch line produced by First Moscow Watch Factory beginning in 1976, featuring the caliber 3133 movement. All-steel design with dual time zone bezel and telemeter chapter ring calibrated in nautical miles. Production ceased in 2011 after MakTime acquired machinery.

Founded in the 1950s, Ollech & Wajs is among the oldest continuously operating watch brands in Israel, established during the formative years of the state and known for robust professional and tool watches with a following in military and diving communities. The brand has an established Tel Aviv presence. For groups seeking non-European itineraries, Israel offers a genuinely different cultural context. Group visitability and current operational arrangements require direct confirmation.

Olmeca is a watch brand with unknown country of origin. The 0826M is a men's quartz analog watch with stainless steel construction, 42mm diameter, business style, and 3 ATM water resistance. Currently sold through Liquidation Nation in Canada.

Canadian watch brand founded in 2020 specializing in titanium adventure watches inspired by aerospace engineering. Known for durable field watches, dive watches, and pilot watches featuring UltraHEX™ titanium construction. Based in North Vancouver, British Columbia.

Canadian adventure watch brand founded in 2020. Specializes in titanium sports watches and gear designed for extreme conditions, featuring their proprietary UltraHEX™ titanium. Based in North Vancouver with a focus on durability and function-forward design.

Radia Watches is an independent watch brand featuring the Trinity collection with distinctive dial designs in yellow and black variants. All Trinity models are priced at $479 USD with interchangeable leather and military straps. Rdunae watches founded in 2019 by designer Feng. Brand name derives from Latin 'Roma die uno non aedificata est' (Rome wasn't built in a day). Specializes in military field watches and dive watches using NH35/NH36 movements and features like BGW9 lume and C3-Superluminova.

Malaysian watch brand offering premium watches at affordable prices. Known for diverse collections including Terra, Hexmariner, and Admiral GMT models. Uses Japanese automatic movements (Miyota) and stainless steel construction.

Revolver-inspired timepiece brand with active product development. Recent launches include SD-1 Sapphire Diver Series and AD5/AD6 models. Website hosted on scylo.com platform.

Microbrand watch company founded by Ramsingh focused on analog timepieces with history and heritage. Known for field watches, divers, and pilot watches at accessible price points. Company emphasizes quality, durability, and generational longevity.

Luxury watch brand founded by Kun-Chi Wu in 2011, known for patented concave crystal construction offering wider visibility and scratch resistance. Wine-inspired design philosophy emphasizing elegant, comfortable timepieces.

Aviation-style watch brand that launched on Kickstarter around 2016. Featured surgical stainless steel casing, sapphire crystal, automatic Miyota movement, and 42-hour power reserve. No confirmed activity since September 2016.

Seestern is an automatic watch brand offering affordable mechanical timepieces. They source self-winding movements directly from manufacturers and sell through their own webstore and AliExpress. Country of origin unknown despite homepage content provided.

Seizenn Watches offers affordable vintage military-style watches with models like the W12 series and bronze case variants. Features mechanical movements and leather straps. Current active e-commerce presence with multiple product lines including MERKUR, Pierre Paulin, and Sugess.

Professional dive watch brand specializing in the Power Dive collection. Features NE57 automatic movements, 316L stainless steel construction, and 200-meter water resistance tested for extreme diving conditions. All five current models priced at $895 USD.

Microbrand revived in July 2023 by a founder who originally owned a Sheffield Allsport watch. Specializes in affordable luxury dive watches with vintage-inspired design using Japanese movements (Seiko NH35/NH34, Miyota 8215/2070). Features 316L steel cases, sapphire crystals, and 20 ATM water resistance.

Shield manufactures professional diving watches rated for 20ATM/600FT, designed for military, police, firefighters, and professional divers. The brand features multiple collections named after notable divers and diving locations. Country of origin and specific founding year could not be determined from available information.
Microbrand established in 2025 creating one-of-a-kind salvaged timepieces. Currently running a Kickstarter campaign for their 'Lost at Sea' collection. Country of origin unknown.

Sidegren is a watch and accessories brand sold through Trendhim, a Danish retailer. The brand offers watches, rings, belts, scarves, and sunglasses at accessible price points. Products feature materials like sterling silver, stainless steel, and vegan leather.

Songdu is a budget watch brand offering affordable quartz timepieces. The D-9237M model features a 42mm stainless steel case with Japanese Miyota 2315 movement and is available in three color variants. Known for clean, geometric dial design and good packaging value at the $25 price point.

US-based watch brand offering homage watches across multiple collections. Known for affordable alternatives to luxury sports watches with quartz and automatic movements. Offers worldwide shipping and buy-now-pay-later options.

Modern evolution of WWII-era Dirty Dozen military field watches. Swiss-made timepieces with stainless steel and bronze case options. Features military heritage design with black, white, and green dial variants.

Typsim produces mechanical watches with models ranging from dive watches (200M series) to field watches (Guide, Architect) and specialty timepieces. Features American-made dual-time mechanisms and has pursued chronometer certification.

Ventus Watches produces vintage-inspired dive watches and field watches with Seiko NH35 automatic movements. Known for cushion case designs reminiscent of 1960s dive watches, offered in stainless steel and brass cases with Swiss Superluminova lume.

Vertigo produces dive, GMT, racing, and pilot watches including models such as the Diver, Medusa, Hippocampus, Tritone, Pilot One V2, Rimonta, Tornante, and Viator GMT. Country of origin is unknown from available content.

Vesuviate is a watch brand named after Mount Vesuvius, with a logo depicting a volcanic fireball used on the crown and clasp. The brand produces automatic watches across multiple collections including the Attivo, Attivo-Chrono, Attivo-Duplex, Volare, and Guilloché Edition lines, with prices ranging from $425 to $957 USD.

Visser Watches produces mechanical watches inspired by aerospace design and fly fishing heritage. The brand offers three main collections: Original Series, Tech Series, and Heritage Series. All current models shown as out of stock; website copyright dated 2018 with no recent activity indicators.

VPC Watch Co. positions watches as storytellers and time capsules built to last. Current offerings include the TYPE 37HW and TYPE 39VM dive watch. Products are limited-edition by design and archived after discontinuation.

W Laboratory is a watch brand with collections including Chronograph, Drift Series, Speed Series, GMT, WorldTimer, Ti Traveller Series, and Ecoventure Series. The brand operates an e-commerce site with USD pricing and ships internationally. No specific founding year, location, or pricing information is visible in the provided homepage content.

Independent microbrand offering small-batch dive watches and chronographs with advanced materials including titanium, timascus, damascus steel, and mokume gane. Emphasizes precision manufacturing with tolerances to 0.01mm and partnerships with Swiss and Japanese suppliers. Offers customization options and community-driven design.

Adventure/hard use watch brand founded in 2019. Specializes in tool watches designed for extreme conditions with models like Explorer Collection, Field Watch Collection, and custom limited editions. Currently selling watches priced in GBP with multiple collections available.

Yukiwatch (not Yakario) is a vintage timepiece and parts supplier established in 2005. Specializes in aftermarket watch parts including dials, hands, and bezels for collectible brands like Rolex and Tudor. Operates as a trusted dealer on RWG and Repgeek communities.

York & Front Watch Co. is a watch brand with an e-commerce presence offering free shipping in North America. The Burrard Series 001 is their featured everyday wristwatch model. Zanuti claims to be watchmakers since 1887. The website shows active sales with a 30% off promotion and 2026 Limited Editions. Collections include GMT Series, Diplomat, Diver Pro, Monaco, Sapphire Caseback, Skipper, and Monte-Carlo models.

Zircon Corporation was founded in 1975 as a manufacturer of digital watches. The company pivoted to electronic hand tools in 1980 and is now primarily known for StudSensor stud finders rather than watches. No current watch production information available.

ZIXEN creates precision mechanical timepieces inspired by 1960s-70s vintage style with clean, simple design. Branded as 'Made by a Diver for a Diver' with models including automatic, chronograph, and manual wind variants. Country of origin unknown; products sold through Touch of Modern marketplace.

Boutique watch brand established in 2014 focused on small quantities, attention to detail, and high quality at reasonable prices. Current collection includes five model lines: Bagheera GMT, Jota, Dino, Jarama, and Indy sport watches. Country of origin unknown.

Israeli watchmaker specializing in hand-assembled automatic watches with Hebrew character indices and design elements. Known for limited edition collections named after Israeli cities (Tel Aviv, Beer Sheva, Jerusalem, Eilat). Features 316L stainless steel cases, automatic movements, and water resistance to 200 meters.

Zuriner is a vintage watch brand sold through della Rocca gioielli, an Italian luxury watch retailer based in Bologna. Only one model listing found (currently sold out), suggesting limited production or discontinued line.
